title: Create Plants vs. Industry
description: A Create Mod based modpack focused around farming and industrial accomplishments
body:
# Create Plants vs. Indusry
Create Plants vs. Industry is a modpack which allows you to focus on agricultural or industrial automation, be that automating crops added by Farmer's Delight, or by automating useful resources for your Create Mod, and Immersive Engineering factories!

Additionally, we have decorational and world gen mods, such as Biomes O' Plenty, Refurbished Furniture, and Macaw's, which give you more variety when building or exploring biomes.

### The Main Mods
- Create
- Immersive Engineering
- Immersive Aircraft
- Immersive Paintings
- Farmers Delight
- ComputerCraft
- Ribbits
- Storage Drawers
- Chipped
- Rechiseled
- Biomes O' Plenty
- Terralith
- Macaw's Mods
- Xaero's World Map and Minimap
- And a few performance boosting mods
